PowerShell($php = "C:\\Users\\NFDorottya\\.config\\herd\\bin\\php84\\php.exe"; $out = "$env:TEMP\\serve_out.txt"; $err = "$env:TEMP\\serve_err.txt"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $php -ArgumentList "artisan","serve","--host=127.0.0.1","--port=8123" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\FogaszatiRendelo\\fogaszat-web" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput $out -RedirectStandardError $err; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Output "HasExited: $\($p.HasExited\)"; if\($p.HasExited\){ Write-Output "ExitCode: $\($p.ExitCode\)" }; Write-Output "--- STDOUT ---"; Get-Content $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "--- STDERR ---"; Get-Content $err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\(-not $p.HasExited\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8123" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) hossz=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "REQ HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(foreach\($u in @\("http://fogaszat-web.test","https://fogaszat-web.test"\)\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "$u -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) hossz=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "$u -> HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; $pages=@{home="/";szolg="/szolgaltatasok/fogszabalyozas";eszak="/fogaszat/eszak-magyarorszag";arlista="/arlista"}; foreach\($k in $pages.Keys\){ try { $h=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base$\($pages[$k]\)" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content; Write-Output "===== $k \(HTTP OK, $\($h.Length\) b\) ====="; foreach\($needle in @\("konzultáció ingyenes","Konzultáció díja",">0<sup>ft","0 Ft</","Ingyenes első konzultáció"\)\){ if\($h -match [regex]::Escape\($needle\)\){ Write-Output "  MARADT \(rossz\): $needle" } }; foreach\($good in @\("Kezelési terv","fogív fokozatos","Fogszabályozási konzultáció","tájékoztató jellegűek"\)\){ if\($h -match [regex]::Escape\($good\)\){ Write-Output "  OK jelen: $good" } } } catch { Write-Output "===== $k HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; try { $fp=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/szolgaltatasok/fogpotlas" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content } catch { Write-Output "fogpotlas HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $fp="" }; try { $fsz=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/szolgaltatasok/fogszabalyozas" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content } catch { Write-Output "fogszab HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $fsz="" }; Write-Output \("fogpotlas tartalmazza 'Anatómikus cirkon korona': " + \($fp -match 'Anat.mikus cirkon korona'\)\); Write-Output \("fogpotlas tartalmazza 'cirkon-info': " + \($fp -match 'cirkon-info'\)\); Write-Output \("fogpotlas tel config szam benne: " + \($fp -match '\\+36706276160'\)\); Write-Output \("fogszabalyozas NEM tartalmazza cirkon blokkot: " + \(-not \($fsz -match 'cirkon-info'\)\)\); Write-Output \("fogpotlas hossz: $\($fp.Length\), fogszab hossz: $\($fsz.Length\)"\))

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; try { $h=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content } catch { Write-Output "HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; exit }; Write-Output \("Csongor kep megvan: " + \($h -match 'images/drnfcsongor\\.jpg'\)\); Write-Output \("szilvi.jpg ELTAVOLITVA: " + \(-not \($h -match 'szilvi\\.jpg'\)\)\); Write-Output \("munkatars-placeholder jelen: " + \($h -match 'munkatars-placeholder'\)\); Write-Output \("Szilvia neve megvan: " + \($h -match 'Nagy-Fazakas Szilvia'\)\); $c = \([regex]::Matches\($h,'munkatars-placeholder'\)\).Count; Write-Output "placeholder elofordulas: $c \(elvart: 1, mert Csongornak van kepe -> a rejtett fallback span is placeholder osztalyu... ellenorizzuk\)"; Write-Output \("bi-person ikon jelen: " + \($h -match 'bi bi-person'\)\))

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; foreach\($p in @\("/","/blog","/arlista","/fogaszat/eszak-magyarorszag"\)\){ try { $h=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content; $ok = \($h -match 'id="telFab"'\) -and \($h -match 'aria-controls="telFabPanel"'\) -and \($h -match 'tel:\\+36706276160'\) -and \($h -match 'aria-expanded="false"'\); Write-Output \("$p -> telFab+aria+tel OK: $ok"\) } catch { Write-Output "$p HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; try { $h=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content } catch { Write-Output "HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; exit }; Write-Output \("HTTP OK, hossz: $\($h.Length\)"\); Write-Output \("Regi 'Atlagos kezelesi ido' ELTUNT: " + \(-not \($h -match 'Átlagos kezelési idő'\)\)\); Write-Output \("'es kivehető készülék' jelen: " + \($h -match 'és kivehető készülék'\)\); Write-Output \("'2-4 alk Jellemzo' jelen: " + \($h -match 'Jellemző alkalmak'\)\); Write-Output \("'akar 8 ton' jelen: " + \($h -match 'akár 8'\)\); Write-Output \("regi '8 ton Atlagos' ELTUNT: " + \(-not \($h -match 'Átlagos fehérítés'\)\)\); Write-Output \("REDUCED JS jelen: " + \($h -match 'prefers-reduced-motion'\)\))

PowerShell($php = "C:\\Users\\NFDorottya\\.config\\herd\\bin\\php84\\php.exe"; $slug = & $php -r "require 'vendor/autoload.php'; `$a=require 'bootstrap/app.php'; `$a->make\(Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel::class\)->bootstrap\(\); echo \\Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\DB::table\('cikkek'\)->where\('id',2\)->value\('slug'\);"; Write-Output "id2 slug: $slug"; $p=\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://fogaszat-web.test/blog/$slug" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content; Write-Output \("blog-table-wrap jelen: " + \($p -match 'blog-table-wrap'\)\); Write-Output \("<table jelen: " + \($p -match '<table'\)\))

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; $pages=@\("/","/arlista","/blog","/galeria","/fogaszat/eszak-magyarorszag","/szolgaltatasok/fogpotlas","/szolgaltatasok/fogszabalyozas","/szolgaltatasok/gyokerkezeles","/szolgaltatasok/prevencio","/szolgaltatasok/foghuzas"\); $allok=$true; foreach\($p in $pages\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "$base$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $code=$r.StatusCode } catch { $code="HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $allok=$false }; Write-Output \("{0,-42} {1}" -f $p,$code\) }; Write-Output "MIND OK: $allok")

PowerShell($base="http://fogaszat-web.test"; foreach\($p in @\("/","/arlista"\)\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "$base$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$p HIBA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; $css=\(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/custom.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content; Write-Output \("custom.css tartalmazza a mobil nav override-ot: " + \($css -match 'Mobil f' + '' \)\); Write-Output \("navbar-mobile ul dropdown kartya szabaly: " + \($css -match 'width: min\\\(300px'\)\))
